question: Would an Evander Holyfield 2020 boxing return set age record?
context: Evander Holyfield will turn 58 years old at the end of 2020.
Steve Ward holds the world's oldest boxer title at age 59.
response:
<reasoning>
Evander Holyfield turned 58 years old at the end of 2020.
Steve Ward held the world's oldest boxer title at age 59.
A boxing return by Evander Holyfield in 2020 would have occurred at age 58.
58 is less than 59.
A 58-year-old boxer does not exceed the age record held by Steve Ward.
An Evander Holyfield 2020 boxing return would not set the age record.
<answer> No
claims: Evander Holyfield turned 58 years old at the end of 2020

A 58-year-old boxer does not exceed the age record held by Steve Ward
An Evander Holyfield 2020 boxing return would not set the age record
